outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX (-12.87B total) across all expiries creates volatility amplification. Dealers short gamma will accelerate any directional move. Expect 2-3x normal volatility on breakouts.
outlook.summary: Market positioned at critical inflection with spot 677.13 sandwiched between immediate support at 675 and resistance at 680. Extreme put skew (PCR up to 5.27 in MONTHLY_2) and uniformly negative gamma exposure indicate dealers will amplify downside if 675 breaks. Max Pain at 685 provides upside magnet but heavy put walls suggest defensive positioning dominates. Watch 680 as trigger point - break above targets 685, break below 675 accelerates toward 660.

levels.motivazione: Massive PUT OI across ALL 5 expiries (157,837 total). Spot just below at 677.13. Negative GEX makes this the critical inflection - break above triggers dealer buying cascade, rejection confirms downside.

Immediate support below spot with significant OI in all 5 expiries (181,147 total). Only 2.13 points from spot. Bearish smirk skew (1.21-1.47) validates support strength. Break triggers dealer hedging cascade.
